data.title: Sonic Ecosystem TVL Exceeds US$1 Billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sonic Labs published a post on the X platform saying that the total locked-in TVL of the Sonic (formerly FTM) ecosystem has exceeded $1 billion.
According to DeFiLlama data, the current TVL of the Sonic ecosystem has reached $1.01 billion, and the total locked-in volume of AAVE V3 under its ecosystem has reached $264.55 million, with an increase of 72.99% in the past 7 days.

data.title: Bitcoin Whales Increase Holdings Amid Market Optimism
data.description: According to Odaily, data from blockchain analytics firm Glassnode reveals that since March 11, Bitcoin whales have acquired over 129,000 BTC, valued at $11.2 billion, with an average purchase price of $87,500. This trend indicates growing confidence among major market participants in the leading cryptocurrency. Analysts attribute Bitcoin's recovery to the U.S. Federal Reserve's dovish statements and cautious optimism regarding the tariffs set to be implemented by U.S. President Donald Trump on April 2.

data.title: Intercontinental Exchange and Circle reach agreement to integrate USDC stablecoin into its products and infrastructure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle co-founder Jeremy Allaire posted on the X platform that global exchange and capital market giant Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) and Circle are working to integrate USDC into their market products and infrastructure. The two companies have reached an agreement to explore the integration of USDC and USYC into a wide range of traditional financial markets, exchanges and clearing houses.

data.title: SEC Chair Nominee Paul Atkins Resigns from Crypto Boards Amid Controversy
data.description:
According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump's nominee for the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) chair, Paul Atkins, has stepped down from his positions on the boards of the Chamber of Digital Commerce and its Token Alliance. This decision comes amid criticism from Senator Elizabeth Warren, who expressed concerns over Atkins' close ties to the cryptocurrency industry.

Documents submitted to the U.S. Office of Government Ethics reveal that Atkins has also pledged to divest from Off the Chain Capital within 120 days of assuming office. Warren had previously highlighted that the Chamber of Digital Commerce is a registered lobbying group for the cryptocurrency sector, raising questions about Atkins' impartiality and commitment to serving the public interest if confirmed as the next SEC chair.

data.title: Gate.io will launch KiloEx(KILO) spot trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch KiloEx (KILO) spot trading at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 27, 2025.

data.title: Zilliqa Resolves Token Balance Issues from X-Bridge Vulnerability
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the public blockchain Zilliqa has announced that it has fully resolved the issues related to zETH and zBNB token balances caused by a vulnerability in the X-Bridge. The team has compensated affected users with ZIL tokens.

Previously, on February 6, an attacker exploited a vulnerability in the X-Bridge, which allowed unauthorized minting of zETH and zBNB tokens.

data.title: Data: Whales have bought more than 129,000 BTC since March 11, and market confidence is strong
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to data tracked by blockchain analysis company Glassnode, since March 11, Bitcoin whales have bought more than 129,000 BTC worth $11.2 billion, with an average purchase price of $87,500, indicating that the largest market participants have growing confidence in the largest cryptocurrency. Analysts believe that the Fed’s dovish remarks and optimism that Trump’s tariffs to be implemented on April 2 will be more cautious than expected have led to BTC’s recovery. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitcoin News: BTC Price Surge to $88,500 But Experts Raise Caution
data.description:
Bitcoin News: The price of Bitcoin (BTC) has surged dramatically to reach a new high of $88,500, prompting excitement among investors, yet financial experts are urging caution, expressing concerns about potential volatility and advising traders to remain vigilant.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/bitcoin-news-btc-price-surge-to-88500-but-experts-raise-caution

data.title: Ghibli-inspired memecoins flood the market – What are they and their obsession?
data.description:
Almost everyone on the internet has used or seen a Ghibli portrait today, the Japanese animation studio-style image that Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg, Ripple Labs executives, and others have shared since ChatGPT launched its latest update. On Tuesday, OpenAI introduced image generation capabilities to its GPT-4o model, allowing users to create AI-generated visuals directly within […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ghibli-inspired-memecoins-flood-the-market/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 87,000 USDT with a 1.32% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 27, 2025, 11:28 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 87,000 USDT and is now trading at 86,966.78125 USDT, with a narrowed 1.32% decrease in 24 hours.
